trans-unit.source: MSB4188: Build was canceled.
trans-unit.target: MSB4188: La génération a été annulée.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4188: "} Error when the build stops suddenly for some reason. For example, because a child node died.

trans-unit.source: Build started.
trans-unit.target: La génération a démarré.

trans-unit.source: The number of elements in the collection is greater than the available space in the destination array (when starting at the specified index).
trans-unit.target: Le nombre d’éléments de la collection est supérieur à l’espace disponible dans le tableau de destination (lors du démarrage à l’index spécifié).

trans-unit.source: MSB4008: A conflicting assembly for the task assembly "{0}" has been found at "{1}".
trans-unit.target: MSB4008: un assembly en conflit avec l'assembly de tâche "{0}" a été trouvé sur "{1}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4008: "}UE: This message is shown when the type/class of a task cannot be resolved uniquely from a single assembly.

trans-unit.source: Custom event type '{0}' is not supported as all custom event types were deprecated. Please use Extended*EventArgs instead. More info: https://aka.ms/msbuild/eventargs
trans-unit.target: Le type d’événement personnalisé '{0}' n’est pas pris en charge, car tous les types d’événement personnalisés ont été dépréciés. Utilisez Extended*EventArgs à la place. Plus d’informations : https://aka.ms/msbuild/eventargs

trans-unit.source: Event type "{0}" was expected to be serializable using the .NET serializer. The event was not serializable and has been ignored.
trans-unit.target: Le type d'événement "{0}" devait être sérialisable à l'aide du sérialiseur .NET. L'événement n'était pas sérialisable et a été ignoré.

trans-unit.note: A file location to be embedded in a string.

trans-unit.source: MSB6005: Task attempted to log before it was initialized. Message was: {0}
trans-unit.target: MSB6005: La tâche a tenté d'ouvrir une session avant d'être initialisée. Le message était le suivant : {0}
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB6005: "}UE: This occurs if the task attempts to log something in its own constructor.

trans-unit.source: MSB3511: "{0}" is an invalid value for the "Importance" parameter. Valid values are: High, Normal and Low.
trans-unit.target: MSB3511: "{0}" n'est pas une valeur valide pour le paramètre "Importance". Les valeurs valides sont : High, Normal et Low.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB3511: "}UE: This message is shown when a user specifies a value for the importance attribute of Message which is not valid. The importance enumeration is: High, Normal and Low. Specifying any other importance will result in this message being shown LOCALIZATION: "Importance" should not be localized. High should not be localized. Normal should not be localized. Low should not be localized.

trans-unit.source: MSB4025: The project file could not be loaded. {0}
trans-unit.target: MSB4025: Impossible de charger le fichier projet. {0}
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4025: "}UE: This message is shown when the project file given to the engine cannot be loaded because the filename/path is invalid, or due to lack of permissions, or incorrect XML. The project filename is not part of the message because it is provided separately to loggers. LOCALIZATION: {0} is a localized message from the CLR/FX explaining why the project is invalid.

trans-unit.source: MSB4103: "{0}" is not a valid logger verbosity level.
trans-unit.target: MSB4103: "{0}" n'est pas un niveau de verbosité de journaliseur valide.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4103: "}

trans-unit.source: MSB5028: Solution filter file at "{0}" includes project "{1}" that is not in the solution file at "{2}".
trans-unit.target: MSB5028: le fichier de filtre de solution sur "{0}" inclut le projet "{1}", qui ne figure pas dans le fichier solution sur "{2}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5028: "}UE: The project filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5025: Json in solution filter file "{0}" is incorrectly formatted.
trans-unit.target: MSB5025: les données JSON du fichier de filtre de solution "{0}" sont dans un format incorrect.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5025: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5026: The solution filter file at "{0}" specifies there will be a solution file at "{1}", but that file does not exist.
trans-unit.target: MSB5026: le fichier de filtre de solution sur "{0}" spécifie l'existence d'un fichier solution sur "{1}", mais ce fichier n'existe pas.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5026: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5009: Error parsing the project "{0}" section with GUID: "{1}". It is nested under "{2}" but that project is not found in the solution.
trans-unit.target: MSB5009: erreur durant l'analyse de la section de projet "{0}" ayant le GUID "{1}". Elle est située sous "{2}" mais ce projet est introuvable dans la solution.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5009: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB4132: The tools version "{0}" is unrecognized. Available tools versions are {1}.
trans-unit.target: MSB4132: La version des outils "{0}" n'est pas reconnue. Les versions disponibles sont {1}.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4132: "}LOCALIZATION: {1} contains a comma separated list.

trans-unit.source: MSB5016: The name "{0}" contains an invalid character "{1}".
trans-unit.target: MSB5016: Le nom "{0}" contient un caractère non valide "{1}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5016: "}

trans-unit.source: "{0}" is a reserved item metadata, and cannot be modified or deleted.
trans-unit.target: "{0}" est une métadonnée d'élément réservée qui ne peut être ni modifiée ni supprimée.
trans-unit.note: UE: Tasks and OM users are not allowed to remove or change the value of the built-in metadata on items e.g. the meta-data "FullPath", "RelativeDir", etc. are reserved.

trans-unit.source: MSB5018: Failed to delete the temporary file "{0}". {1} {2}
trans-unit.target: MSB5018: Impossible de supprimer le fichier temporaire « {0} ». {1} {2}
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5018: "}

trans-unit.source: MSB4077: The "{0}" task has been marked with the attribute LoadInSeparateAppDomain, but does not derive from MarshalByRefObject. Check that the task derives from MarshalByRefObject or AppDomainIsolatedTask.
trans-unit.target: MSB4077: la tâche "{0}" a été marquée avec l'attribut LoadInSeparateAppDomain, mais ne dérive pas de MarshalByRefObject. Vérifiez que la tâche dérive de MarshalByRefObject ou de AppDomainIsolatedTask.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB4077: "}LOCALIZATION: <LoadInSeparateAppDomain>, <MarshalByRefObject>, <AppDomainIsolatedTask> should not be localized.

trans-unit.source: MSB5002: Terminating the task executable "{0}" because it did not finish within the specified limit of {1} milliseconds.
trans-unit.target: MSB5002: Arrêt de la tâche exécutable "{0}", car elle ne s'est pas terminée dans le délai spécifié de {1} millisecondes.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5002: "}

trans-unit.source: Parameter "{0}" cannot have zero length.
trans-unit.target: La longueur du paramètre "{0}" ne peut pas être égale à zéro.

trans-unit.source: The resource string "{0}" for the "{1}" task cannot be found. Confirm that the resource name "{0}" is correctly spelled, and the resource exists in the task's assembly.
trans-unit.target: La chaîne de ressource "{0}" pour la tâche "{1}" est introuvable. Vérifiez que le nom de ressource "{0}" est bien orthographié et que la ressource existe dans l'assembly de la tâche.

trans-unit.source: The "{0}" task has not registered its resources. In order to use the "TaskLoggingHelper.FormatResourceString()" method this task needs to register its resources either during construction, or via the "TaskResources" property.
trans-unit.target: La tâche "{0}" n'a pas inscrit ses ressources. Pour pouvoir utiliser la méthode "TaskLoggingHelper.FormatResourceString()", cette tâche doit inscrire ses ressources durant la construction ou par le biais de la propriété "TaskResources".
trans-unit.note: LOCALIZATION: "TaskLoggingHelper.FormatResourceString()" and "TaskResources" should not be localized.

trans-unit.source: MSB5004: The solution file has two projects named "{0}".
trans-unit.target: MSB5004: Le fichier solution contient deux projets nommés "{0}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5004: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5005: Error parsing project section for project "{0}". The project file name "{1}" contains invalid characters.
trans-unit.target: MSB5005: Erreur pendant l'analyse de la section du projet "{0}". Le nom du fichier projet "{1}" contient des caractères non valides.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5005: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5006: Error parsing project section for project "{0}". The project file name is empty.
trans-unit.target: MSB5006: Erreur lors de l'analyse de la section du projet "{0}". Le nom du fichier projet est vide.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5006: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5007: Error parsing the project configuration section in solution file. The entry "{0}" is invalid.
trans-unit.target: MSB5007: Erreur pendant l'analyse de la section de configuration de projet dans le fichier solution. L'entrée "{0}" n'est pas valide.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5007: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5008: Error parsing the solution configuration section in solution file. The entry "{0}" is invalid.
trans-unit.target: MSB5008: Erreur pendant l'analyse de la section de configuration de solution dans le fichier solution. L'entrée "{0}" n'est pas valide.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5008: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5009: Error parsing the nested project section in solution file.
trans-unit.target: MSB5009: Erreur pendant l'analyse de la section du projet imbriqué dans le fichier solution.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5009: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5023: Error parsing the nested project section in solution file. A project with the GUID "{0}" is listed as being nested under project "{1}", but does not exist in the solution.
trans-unit.target: MSB5023: Erreur pendant l'analyse de la section du projet imbriqué dans le fichier solution. Un projet avec le GUID "{0}" est répertorié comme étant imbriqué sous le projet "{1}", mais il n'existe pas dans la solution.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5023: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5010: No file format header found.
trans-unit.target: MSB5010: Aucun en-tête de format de fichier trouvé.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5010: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5011: Parent project GUID not found in "{0}" project dependency section.
trans-unit.target: MSB5011: GUID du projet parent introuvable dans la section de dépendance du projet "{0}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5011: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5012: Unexpected end-of-file reached inside "{0}" project section.
trans-unit.target: MSB5012: Fin du fichier inattendue atteinte à l'intérieur de la section de projet "{0}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5012: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5013: Error parsing a project section.
trans-unit.target: MSB5013: Erreur lors de l'analyse d'une section de projet.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5013: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5014: File format version is not recognized. MSBuild can only read solution files between versions {0}.0 and {1}.0, inclusive.
trans-unit.target: MSB5014: La version du format du fichier n'est pas reconnue. MSBuild peut lire uniquement les fichiers solution entre les versions {0}.0 et {1}.0 (inclus).
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5014: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: MSB5015: The properties could not be read from the WebsiteProperties section of the "{0}" project.
trans-unit.target: MSB5015: Impossible de lire les propriétés dans la section WebsiteProperties du projet "{0}".
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5015: "}UE: The solution filename is provided separately to loggers.

trans-unit.source: Unrecognized solution version "{0}", attempting to continue.
trans-unit.target: Version de solution non reconnue "{0}", tentative de poursuite.

trans-unit.source: Solution file
trans-unit.target: Fichier solution
trans-unit.note: UE: this fragment is used to describe errors found while parsing solution files. For example, if a normal error is displayed like this: "MSBUILD : error MSB0000: This is an error.", then an error from solution parsing would look like this: "MSBUILD : Solution file error MSB0000: This is an error." LOCALIZATION: This fragment needs to be localized.

trans-unit.source: MSB5019: The project file is malformed: "{0}". {1}
trans-unit.target: MSB5019: Le fichier projet est incorrect : "{0}". {1}
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5019: "}

trans-unit.source: MSB5020: Could not load the project file: "{0}". {1}
trans-unit.target: MSB5020: Impossible de charger le fichier projet : "{0}". {1}
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5020: "}

trans-unit.source: MSB5021: Terminating the task executable "{0}" and its child processes because the build was canceled.
trans-unit.target: MSB5021: Arrêt de la tâche exécutable "{0}" et de ses processus enfants, car la génération a été annulée.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5021: "}

trans-unit.source: This collection is read-only.
trans-unit.target: Cette collection est en lecture seule.

trans-unit.source: Parameter "{0}" with assigned value "{1}" cannot have invalid path or invalid file characters.
trans-unit.target: Le paramètre "{0}" avec la valeur assignée "{1}" ne peut pas avoir un chemin non valide ou des caractères de fichier non valides.

trans-unit.source: MSB5029: The value "{0}" of the "{1}" attribute in element <{2}> in file "{3}" is a wildcard that results in enumerating all files on the drive, which was likely not intended. Check that referenced properties are always defined and that the project and current working directory are not at the drive root.
trans-unit.target: MSB5029: La valeur «{0}» de l’attribut «{1}» dans l’élément <{2}> dans le fichier «{3}» est un caractère générique qui entraîne l’énumération de tous les fichiers sur le lecteur, ce qui n’était probablement pas prévu. Vérifiez que les propriétés référencées sont toujours définies et que le projet et le répertoire de travail actuel ne se trouvent pas à la racine du lecteur.
trans-unit.note: {StrBegin="MSB5029: "}UE: This is a generic message that is displayed when we find a project element that has a drive enumerating wildcard value for one of its attributes e.g. <Compile Include="$(NotAlwaysDefined)\**\*.cs"> -- if the property is undefined, the value of Include should not result in enumerating all files on drive.
